member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Configuration.GraphRAGConfig
member.summary: Configuration for GraphRAG features.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Configuration.SemanticChunkingConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration loader for semantic chunking from appsettings.json

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Configuration.SemanticChunkingConfiguration.LoadFromConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Load semantic chunking options from configuration Expected section: "DocumentStore:SemanticChunking"

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Configuration.SemanticChunkingConfiguration.LoadTextChunkingOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Load text chunking options from configuration (including semantic options) Expected section: "DocumentStore"

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine
member.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine Combines vector search with AI generation for context-aware responses. Supports metadata-first search with optional embeddings. Supports composite scoring with tag relevance, recency, and position weighting.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.#ctor(Hazina.AI.Providers.Core.IProviderOrchestrator,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.IVectorStore,Hazina.Neurochain.Core.NeuroChainOrchestrator,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGConfig)
member.summary: Create RAGEngine with vector store (backwards compatible).

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.#ctor(Hazina.AI.Providers.Core.IProviderOrchestrator,IQueryableMetadataStore,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.IVectorStore,Hazina.Neurochain.Core.NeuroChainOrchestrator,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGConfig)
member.summary: Create RAGEngine with metadata store for metadata-first search. Vector store is optional when using metadata-only search.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.#ctor(Hazina.AI.Providers.Core.IProviderOrchestrator,IQueryableMetadataStore,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.IVectorStore,ITagScoringService,ICompositeScorer,Hazina.Neurochain.Core.NeuroChainOrchestrator,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGConfig)
member.summary: Create RAGEngine with composite scoring support. This enables query-adaptive tag relevance scoring.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.QueryAsync(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query using RAG - retrieve relevant context and generate response. Supports both embedding-based and metadata-only search.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.RetrieveWithEmbeddingsAsync(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve documents using embedding-based vector search.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.RetrieveWithMetadataAsync(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve documents using metadata filtering and keyword search. No embeddings required.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.CalculateKeywordRelevance(System.String,DocumentMetadata,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate a relevance score for keyword search results. Uses position-based ranking since results are already ordered by relevance.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.IndexDocumentsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.Document},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Index documents for retrieval

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Search documents by similarity

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.ApplyCompositeScoringAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument},System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Apply composite scoring to retrieved documents. Uses tag relevance, recency, and position to re-rank results.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGEngine.ConvertToDocumentMetadata(Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument)
member.summary: Convert RetrievedDocument to DocumentMetadata for scoring.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGConfig
member.summary: RAG configuration

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions
member.summary: RAG query options

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.UseEmbeddings
member.summary: Whether to use embeddings for semantic search. Default: true (backwards compatible). When false, uses metadata filtering and keyword search only.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.MetadataFilter
member.summary: Optional metadata filter to apply before embedding search. When UseEmbeddings=false, this is the primary filter. When UseEmbeddings=true, this pre-filters before vector search.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.KeywordSearchText
member.summary: Text to search for when UseEmbeddings=false (keyword search). If null, uses the query text.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.UseCompositeScoring
member.summary: Whether to apply composite scoring to retrieved documents. Default: false (backwards compatible). When true, re-ranks results using tag relevance, recency, and position.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.ScoringOptions
member.summary: Configuration for composite scoring weights. If null, uses ScoringOptions.Default.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.TagScoringContext
member.summary: Context to use for tag scoring (e.g., system instruction or task description). If null, uses the query text.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGQueryOptions.TagScoreCacheAge
member.summary: Maximum age of cached tag scores to use. If null, always uses cached scores regardless of age.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RAGResponse
member.summary: RAG response

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.Document
member.summary: Document for indexing

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument
member.summary: Retrieved document with similarity score

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.IndexingResult
member.summary: Indexing result

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.IVectorStore
member.summary: Vector store interface (simplified)

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.VectorSearchResult
member.summary: Vector search result

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor
member.summary: Extracts basic metadata from text chunks using rule-based methods (no LLM required) - TF-IDF keywords - Extractive summaries - Basic statistics Cost: FREE

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.ExtractMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Extract basic metadata from a text chunk

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.ExtractKeywordsTFIDF(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Extract keywords using TF-IDF (Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency) Simplified version: just uses term frequency within the chunk

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.ExtractSummary(System.String)
member.summary: Generate extractive summary (first sentence or most representative sentence)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.CountWords(System.String)
member.summary: Count words in text

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.CountSentences(System.String)
member.summary: Count sentences in text

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.TokenizeAndClean(System.String)
member.summary: Tokenize text and clean (remove punctuation, stop words, etc.)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.DetectCode(System.String)
member.summary: Detect if text contains code (heuristic)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.DetectUrls(System.String)
member.summary: Detect if text contains URLs

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.BasicMetadataExtractor.DetectNumbers(System.String)
member.summary: Detect if text contains significant numbers/statistics

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector
member.summary: Detects the content type of text for specialized chunking strategies

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.Detect(System.String)
member.summary: Detect content type from text using heuristics

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.HasCodePatterns(System.String)
member.summary: Check if text contains code patterns

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetCodeScore(System.String)
member.summary: Get code score (0-100)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.HasMarkdownPatterns(System.String)
member.summary: Check if text contains markdown patterns

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetMarkdownScore(System.String)
member.summary: Get markdown score (0-100)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.HasJsonPatterns(System.String)
member.summary: Check if text contains JSON patterns

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetJsonScore(System.String)
member.summary: Get JSON score (0-100)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.HasTechnicalPatterns(System.String)
member.summary: Check if text contains technical documentation patterns

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetTechnicalScore(System.String)
member.summary: Get technical documentation score (0-100)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetRecommendedSplitPattern(Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType)
member.summary: Get recommended sentence split pattern for content type

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetRecommendedMinChunkSize(Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType)
member.summary: Get recommended minimum chunk size for content type

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.GetRecommendedMaxChunkSize(Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType)
member.summary: Get recommended maximum chunk size for content type

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ContentTypeDetector.ApplyContentTypeOptimizations(Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Apply content-type specific adjustments to chunking options

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache
member.summary: In-memory cache for sentence embeddings to avoid redundant API calls Significant cost savings when processing documents with repeated text Key: Content hash (SHA256) Value: Embedding vector

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.TryGet(System.String,Embedding@)
member.summary: Try to get a cached embedding for the given text

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.Add(System.String,Embedding)
member.summary: Add an embedding to the cache

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.GetOrAdd(System.String,System.Func{System.String,Embedding})
member.summary: Get or add an embedding (atomic operation)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.GetOrAddAsync(System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Embedding}})
member.summary: Get or add an embedding async (atomic operation)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.Clear
member.summary: Clear all cached embeddings

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.GetStats
member.summary: Get cache statistics

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.ComputeHash(System.String)
member.summary: Compute SHA256 hash of text for cache key

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.EmbeddingCache.Trim(System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove least recently used items if cache exceeds max size

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.CacheStats
member.summary: Cache statistics

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker
member.summary: Hierarchical chunking for large documents Splits large documents into sections, then chunks each section independently Improves performance and quality for documents >5000 characters

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker.ChunkAsync(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Chunk large documents hierarchically

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker.SplitIntoSections(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Split text into sections based on structural markers

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker.SplitMarkdownSections(System.String)
member.summary: Split markdown document into sections by headers

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker.SplitCodeSections(System.String)
member.summary: Split code document into sections by class/function definitions

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker.SplitTechnicalDocSections(System.String)
member.summary: Split technical documentation into sections

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker.SplitGenericSections(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Split text into generic sections by size

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentSection
member.summary: Represents a section of a document

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunkerExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for HierarchicalChunker to support chunk set generation with summaries. Provides methods to create ChunkSet objects from hierarchical sections.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunkerExtensions.ChunkWithSetsAsync(Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunker,System.String,System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Chunk document hierarchically and generate chunk sets with summaries. Returns both the individual chunks and the chunk sets.
member.param: The document ID for chunk set creation.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunkerExtensions.GenerateChunkSets(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Generate chunk sets from hierarchically chunked chunks. Groups chunks by section and generates summaries.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.HierarchicalChunkerExtensions.GenerateSectionSummary(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Generate a summary for a section's chunks. Uses Basic tier (extractive) or LLM tier if configured.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor
member.summary: Extracts rich metadata from text chunks using LLM Premium tier: ~$0.0001 per chunk (using gpt-4o-mini) Provides: summaries, topics, section types, importance scores, relationships

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.ExtractMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extract metadata for a single chunk using LLM

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.ExtractBatchMetadataAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extract metadata for multiple chunks in a batch (more efficient) Reduces latency and can reduce costs by combining multiple chunks in one call

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.ProcessBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process a single batch of chunks

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.ExtractIndividuallyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fallback: extract metadata for each chunk individually

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.BuildSingleChunkPrompt(System.String)
member.summary: Build prompt for single chunk metadata extraction

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.BuildBatchPrompt(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk})
member.summary: Build prompt for batch metadata extraction

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.CreateDefaultMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Create default metadata when LLM extraction fails

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.LLMMetadataExtractor.EnrichChunksAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enrich text chunks with LLM-generated metadata (in-place)

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata
member.summary: LLM-generated metadata for a single text chunk Used for premium metadata extraction (Tier: LLM)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata.Summary
member.summary: One-sentence summary of the chunk's main idea

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata.Topic
member.summary: Primary topic or subject matter of the chunk

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata.Keywords
member.summary: List of 3-5 key terms or concepts

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata.SectionType
member.summary: Type of content section (e.g., Introduction, TechnicalDescription, Example, Configuration)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata.ImportanceScore
member.summary: Importance score (1-10, where 10 is most important) Used for relevance boosting in retrieval

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.ChunkMetadata.ReferencedTopics
member.summary: Topics or concepts this chunk references Enables relationship tracking across chunks

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.BatchChunkMetadata
member.summary: Batch response for multiple chunks metadata extraction More efficient than individual calls (reduces latency and can reduce costs)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.BatchChunkMetadata.Chunks
member.summary: List of metadata for each chunk, in the same order as the input

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.Models.SectionTypes
member.summary: Supported section types for content classification

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for semantic similarity-based chunking

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Enable/disable semantic chunking entirely Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.Mode
member.summary: Chunking mode: Similarity (embedding-based), LLM (expensive), or Hybrid Default: Similarity (cost-efficient)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.SentenceSplitPattern
member.summary: Regex pattern for sentence splitting Default: split on periods, exclamation marks, question marks followed by whitespace Example: @"(?<=[.!?])\s+"

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.MinSentenceLength
member.summary: Minimum sentence length to include (characters) Sentences shorter than this will be merged with adjacent sentences Default: 10

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.MaxSentenceLength
member.summary: Maximum sentence length (split long sentences if exceeded) null = no limit Default: null

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.SimilarityThreshold
member.summary: Cosine similarity threshold for hard topic boundaries When similarity between adjacent sentences falls below this, create a chunk boundary Range: 0.0-1.0 Lower values = more sensitive to topic shifts (more, smaller chunks) Higher values = less sensitive (fewer, larger chunks) Recommended: 0.65-0.75 Default: 0.70

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.SoftSimilarityThreshold
member.summary: Soft similarity threshold (used with min chunk size constraint) Only create boundary if chunk size >= MinChunkSize AND similarity below this threshold Should be higher than SimilarityThreshold Range: 0.0-1.0 Recommended: 0.75-0.85 Default: 0.80

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.UseRollingAverage
member.summary: Use rolling average similarity (smooths out noise) Averages similarity across a window of adjacent sentences Reduces false positives from single outlier sentences Default: false

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.RollingWindowSize
member.summary: Window size for rolling average (number of adjacent sentence pairs) Only used if UseRollingAverage = true Default: 3

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.MinChunkSize
member.summary: Minimum chunk size (characters) Prevents creating very small chunks Default: 300

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.MaxChunkSize
member.summary: Maximum chunk size (characters) Forces chunk split even if similarity is high Default: 2000

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.ParagraphBoundaryTolerance
member.summary: Prefer splitting at paragraph boundaries if chunk size is within this range of ideal size null = don't prefer paragraph boundaries Example: If target chunk is 1000 chars and tolerance is 200, split at paragraph if it creates chunks between 800-1200 chars Default: 200

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.ExtractMetadata
member.summary: Enable metadata extraction (keywords, summaries, etc.) Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.MetadataTier
member.summary: Metadata extraction tier: None, Basic (free), or LLM (premium) - None: No metadata extraction - Basic: Rule-based (TF-IDF keywords, extractive summaries) - FREE - LLM: AI-generated metadata (topics, summaries, section types) - ~$0.0001 per chunk Default: Basic (free)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.UseLLMMetadata
member.summary: Use LLM for rich metadata generation (summary, topics, section types) Only used if MetadataTier = LLM Cost: ~$0.0001 per chunk Default: false

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.LLMMetadataModel
member.summary: LLM model to use for metadata extraction (if UseLLMMetadata = true) null = use default model from ILLMClient Example: "gpt-4o-mini" Default: null

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.BatchLLMMetadata
member.summary: Batch LLM metadata calls for efficiency Sends multiple chunks in a single LLM request Reduces latency and can reduce costs Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.MaxLLMBatchSize
member.summary: Maximum chunks to include in a single LLM batch request Prevents request size from exceeding token limits Default: 10

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.UseHierarchicalChunking
member.summary: Use hierarchical chunking for large documents Splits document into sections first, then chunks each section independently Improves performance for documents larger than HierarchicalThreshold Default: false

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.HierarchicalThreshold
member.summary: Document size threshold for hierarchical chunking (characters) Documents larger than this will use hierarchical chunking Default: 10000

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.HierarchicalSectionSize
member.summary: Target section size for hierarchical chunking (characters) Large documents will be split into sections of approximately this size Default: 5000

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.GenerateChunkSets
member.summary: Generate chunk sets with summaries for hierarchically chunked documents Chunk sets represent logical groupings of chunks (e.g., document sections) with collective summaries describing the group's content Only applies when UseHierarchicalChunking = true Default: true (enabled if hierarchical chunking is used)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.ChunkSetSummaryTier
member.summary: Metadata extraction tier for chunk set summaries - Basic: Extractive summarization (first sentence from combined chunk text) - FREE - LLM: AI-generated summary of the section content - ~$0.0005 per section Default: Basic (free tier)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.FallbackStrategy
member.summary: Fallback strategy if semantic chunking fails (e.g., no embeddings available, error) Default: Paragraph

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.CacheEmbeddings
member.summary: Cache sentence embeddings for reuse within the same document Reduces embedding API calls (cost savings) Default: true

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.ContentType
member.summary: Content type for specialized chunking behavior null = auto-detect Options: Prose, TechnicalDoc, Code, Markdown, Json, Mixed Default: null (auto-detect)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions.TopKeywordsCount
member.summary: Number of top keywords to extract (Basic metadata tier) Default: 5

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingMode
member.summary: Semantic chunking modes

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingMode.Similarity
member.summary: Embedding-based similarity detection (cost-efficient, recommended) Uses cosine similarity between sentence embeddings to detect topic boundaries Cost: Near-zero if embeddings are reused for retrieval

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingMode.LLM
member.summary: LLM-based boundary detection (expensive, highest quality) Uses LLM to analyze document structure and propose boundaries Cost: ~$0.0003 per document analysis

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingMode.Hybrid
member.summary: Hybrid approach: embedding detection + LLM validation Uses embeddings for initial boundaries, LLM to validate and refine Cost: ~$0.0002 per document

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.MetadataExtractionTier
member.summary: Metadata extraction tiers

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.MetadataExtractionTier.None
member.summary: No metadata extraction

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.MetadataExtractionTier.Basic
member.summary: Rule-based metadata extraction (FREE) - TF-IDF keywords - Extractive summaries (first sentence) - Basic statistics (word count, sentence count)

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.MetadataExtractionTier.LLM
member.summary: LLM-generated metadata (premium) - AI-generated summaries - Topic classification - Section type detection - Importance scoring Cost: ~$0.0001 per chunk

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType
member.summary: Document content types for specialized chunking

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.Prose
member.summary: Natural language prose (articles, books, essays)

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.TechnicalDoc
member.summary: Technical documentation (API docs, manuals, guides)

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.Code
member.summary: Source code files

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.Markdown
member.summary: Markdown formatted documents

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.Json
member.summary: JSON or other structured data

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.Mixed
member.summary: Mixed content types

member.name: F:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.DocumentContentType.Other
member.summary: Unknown or other content type

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker
member.summary: Semantic chunking using embedding similarity to detect topic boundaries Cost-efficient: Uses embeddings instead of expensive LLM calls Cost: Near-zero if embeddings are reused for retrieval

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.ChunkAsync(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Chunk text using semantic similarity analysis

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.SplitIntoSentences(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Split text into sentences using configured pattern

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.GenerateSentenceEmbeddingsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generate embeddings for all sentences in batch Uses cache to avoid redundant API calls for duplicate content

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.CalculatePairwiseSimilarities(System.Collections.Generic.List{Embedding})
member.summary: Calculate cosine similarity between adjacent sentences

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.DetectSemanticBoundaries(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Detect semantic boundaries based on similarity drops

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.ApplyRollingAverage(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Int32)
member.summary: Apply rolling average to similarity scores to smooth out noise

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.CreateChunksFromBoundaries(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Create text chunks from detected boundaries

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.EnrichWithMetadataAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk},Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enrich chunks with metadata (basic and/or LLM-generated)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.CreateSingleChunk(System.String,System.Int32,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Create a single chunk from entire text

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.FallbackChunk(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticChunkingOptions)
member.summary: Fallback to simpler chunking strategy if semantic chunking fails

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.GetCacheStats
member.summary: Get cache statistics

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.ClearCache
member.summary: Clear the embedding cache

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.SemanticSimilarityChunker.TrimCache(System.Int32)
member.summary: Trim cache to maximum size

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunker
member.summary: Splits text into chunks for embedding generation Supports multiple strategies including semantic similarity-based chunking

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunker.ChunkText(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Split text into chunks with overlap (synchronous) Note: Semantic chunking requires async API - use ChunkTextAsync for semantic strategy

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunker.ChunkTextAsync(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunkingOptions,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Split text into chunks asynchronously (supports semantic chunking)
member.param: Chunking options (overrides constructor options if provided)
Base metadata to include in all chunks

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunk
member.summary: Text chunk with metadata

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunkingOptions
member.summary: Text chunking options

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunkingOptions.Strategy
member.summary: Chunking strategy to use Default: FixedSize (backwards compatible)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunkingOptions.ChunkSize
member.summary: Chunk size in characters (for FixedSize, Sentence, Paragraph strategies) Default: 1000

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunkingOptions.OverlapSize
member.summary: Overlap size in characters (for FixedSize strategy) Default: 200

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.TextChunkingOptions.SemanticOptions
member.summary: Semantic chunking options (only used when Strategy = Semantic) null = use default semantic options

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Embeddings.ChunkingStrategy
member.summary: Chunking strategies

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.DocumentStoreSemanticExtensions

member.summary: Store a document using semantic chunking
member.param: Chunking options (optional, defaults to Semantic strategy)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.DocumentStoreSemanticExtensions.StoreChunkWithMetadata(DocumentStore,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Store a chunk with its semantic metadata Note: Currently stores chunks using legacy architecture (embeddings without metadata). Future enhancement: Store metadata with embeddings when vector store supports it.
Store binary document with semantic chunking

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.RetrievalServiceExtensions
member.summary: DI extension methods for registering retrieval pipeline components

member.summary: Register the default retrieval pipeline with vector store retriever and no-op reranker

member.summary: Register a custom retriever implementation

member.summary: Register a custom reranker implementation

member.summary: Register a custom retrieval pipeline implementation

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.RetrievalPipelineOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for retrieval pipeline

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.RetrievalPipelineOptions.RerankingStrategy
member.summary: Reranking strategy to use

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.RetrievalPipelineOptions.LlmJudgeOptions
member.summary: Options for LLM judge reranker (if using LlmJudge strategy)

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Extensions.RerankingStrategy
member.summary: Reranking strategy enumeration

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Explainability.RetrievalTrace
member.summary: Trace object showing the reasoning path for a retrieval result. Provides explainability for hybrid vector + graph retrieval.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Explainability.RetrievalStep
member.summary: Individual step in the retrieval process.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Explainability.ExplainabilityService
member.summary: Service for generating explainable retrieval traces.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Explainability.ExplainabilityService.GenerateExplanation(Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalResult)
member.summary: Generates a human-readable explanation for a retrieval result.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Explainability.ExplainabilityService.CreateTrace(System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalResult,System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Explainability.RetrievalStep})
member.summary: Creates a complete retrieval trace with all steps.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphEntity
member.summary: Represents an entity node in the knowledge graph.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphPath
member.summary: Represents a path through the knowledge graph.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphRelationship
member.summary: Represents a directed relationship between two entities.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphSchema
member.summary: Defines the schema/ontology for the knowledge graph.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.EntityNormalizationService
member.summary: Entity normalization and deduplication service.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.GraphConstructionPipeline
member.summary: Orchestrates the complete graph construction pipeline from document to knowledge graph.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.GraphConstructionPipeline.ProcessDocumentAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes a document through the complete graph construction pipeline.
member.returns: Result containing statistics about the graph construction

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.GraphConstructionPipeline.ProcessDocumentsBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes multiple documents in batch.
member.param: Dictionary of document ID to text content

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.GraphConstructionResult
member.summary: Result of graph construction process for a document.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.IEntityExtractor
member.summary: Extracts named entities from text using LLM-based analysis.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.IEntityExtractor.ExtractEntitiesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extracts entities from the given text.
member.param: Optional document ID for provenance tracking
member.returns: List of extracted entities with confidence scores

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.IEntityNormalizer
member.summary: Normalizes and deduplicates entities in the knowledge graph.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.IEntityNormalizer.NormalizeEntityAsync(Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphEntity,Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Normalizes an entity by checking for duplicates and merging if necessary.
member.param: The graph store to check for existing entities
member.returns: Normalized entity (may be merged with existing entity)

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.ILLMTextService
member.summary: Simplified text-in/text-out LLM service for graph construction.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.ILLMTextService.GetResponseAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a text response from the LLM for a given prompt.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.IRelationshipExtractor
member.summary: Extracts relationships between entities from text.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.IRelationshipExtractor.ExtractRelationshipsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphEntity},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extracts relationships between the given entities based on text context.
member.param: Entities already extracted from the text
member.returns: List of relationships found between entities

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.LLMEntityExtractor
member.summary: LLM-based entity extraction using structured prompts.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.LLMRelationshipExtractor
member.summary: LLM-based relationship extraction between entities.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Pipeline.LLMTextService
member.summary: Simple text-in/text-out wrapper around IProviderOrchestrator.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalService
member.summary: Hybrid retrieval service combining vector similarity search with knowledge graph traversal.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalService.RetrieveAsync(System.Single[],System.Int32,Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs hybrid retrieval combining vector search and graph traversal.
member.param: Number of top results to return
member.returns: Ranked list of hybrid retrieval results

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalResult
member.summary: Result from hybrid retrieval combining vector and graph search.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.RetrievalSource
member.summary: Source of retrieval result.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.HybridRetrievalOptions
member.summary: Options for hybrid retrieval.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Retrieval.FusionStrategy
member.summary: Strategy for fusing vector and graph results.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.GraphStoreFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating appropriate IGraphStore implementations based on configuration.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.GraphStoreFactory.Create(Hazina.AI.RAG.Configuration.GraphRAGConfig,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Creates a graph store based on the provided configuration.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore
member.summary: Interface for graph storage and query operations. Implementations can use SQLite, Neo4j, or in-memory storage.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.AddEntitiesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphEntity},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds multiple entities to the graph store.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.GetEntityByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an entity by its ID.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.SearchEntitiesByNameAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches for entities by name and optional type.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.SearchEntitiesByEmbeddingAsync(System.Single[],System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches for entities similar to the given embedding.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.GetEntitiesByDocumentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds all entities associated with a specific document.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.AddRelationshipsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphRelationship},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds multiple relationships to the graph store.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.GetRelationshipsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all relationships for a given entity.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.GetNeighborsAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets neighboring entities at a specified depth.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.FindPathsAsync(System.String,System.String,Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.PathFindingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds paths between two entities.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.SearchByLinkageAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches entities connected to the given entity by a specific predicate.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.UpdateEntityAsync(Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Models.GraphEntity,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing entity.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.DeleteEntityAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an entity and its relationships.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.IGraphStore.GetStatisticsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets statistics about the graph (entity count, relationship count, etc.).

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.GraphStatistics
member.summary: Statistics about the knowledge graph.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.InMemoryGraphStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation of graph storage for testing and development. NOT recommended for production use - data is lost when application restarts.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Graph.Storage.SQLiteGraphStore
member.summary: SQLite-based graph storage implementation. Provides persistent storage with full-text search and indexing.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IReranker
member.summary: Abstraction for reranking retrieval candidates. Rerankers can use different strategies (LLM-based, cross-encoder, hybrid, or no-op).

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IReranker.RerankAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rerank candidates and return top-N results
member.param: Number of top results to return after reranking

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate
member.summary: Represents a single retrieval candidate from a document store. Carries all information needed for reranking and answer composition.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate.ChunkId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the chunk

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate.SourceDocumentId
member.summary: Identifier of the source document this chunk belongs to

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate.OriginalScore
member.summary: Original similarity score from vector search (0.0 to 1.0)

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate.RerankScore
member.summary: Rerank score if reranking was applied, null otherwise

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate.Text
member.summary: Text content of the chunk

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalCandidate.Metadata
member.summary: Optional metadata for extensibility

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.RetrievalCandidate
member.summary: Default implementation of IRetrievalCandidate

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalPipeline
member.summary: Orchestrates the full retrieval pipeline: retrieve → rerank → return

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetrievalPipeline.RetrieveAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute the full retrieval pipeline
member.param: Number of candidates to retrieve initially
Number of top results to return after reranking

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetriever
member.summary: Abstraction for retrieving candidate chunks from a document store or vector database. Decouples retrieval from reranking and generation.

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Interfaces.IRetriever.GetCandidatesAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve top-K candidates for a given query
member.returns: List of retrieval candidates ordered by similarity

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.LlmJudgeReranker
member.summary: Reranks candidates using LLM-based relevance scoring with a stable, deterministic prompt. Each candidate is scored independently on a 0-10 scale for relevance to the query.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.LlmJudgeRerankerOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for LlmJudgeReranker

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.LlmJudgeRerankerOptions.SystemPrompt
member.summary: System prompt that instructs the LLM on its role

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.LlmJudgeRerankerOptions.PromptTemplate
member.summary: Template for the scoring prompt. Use {QUERY} and {DOCUMENT} placeholders.

member.name: P:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.LlmJudgeRerankerOptions.MaxDocumentLength
member.summary: Maximum document length to include in the prompt (to avoid token limits)

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.NoOpReranker
member.summary: No-op reranker that simply returns candidates unchanged. Useful for baseline comparisons and when reranking is not needed.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker
member.summary: Reranks retrieved documents using various strategies

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.RerankAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rerank documents for better relevance

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.RerankWithLLMAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rerank using LLM to assess relevance

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.RerankHybridAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Hybrid reranking combining similarity and LLM

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.ScoreRelevanceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Score document relevance using LLM

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.FilterByRelevance(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument},System.Double)
member.summary: Filter documents by minimum relevance threshold

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.DiversifyResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{Hazina.AI.RAG.Core.RetrievedDocument},System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Diversify results to reduce redundancy

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.Reranker.CalculateTextSimilarity(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Simple text similarity calculation

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.RerankingOptions
member.summary: Reranking options

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.RerankingStrategy
member.summary: Reranking strategies

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.RetrievalPipeline
member.summary: Default implementation of IRetrievalPipeline. Orchestrates the retrieval → rerank → return flow with configurable components.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Retrieval.VectorStoreRetriever
member.summary: Adapts IVectorSearchStore + IEmbeddingGenerator to IRetriever interface. Handles query embedding generation and vector search in a single call.

member.name: T:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter
member.summary: Advanced sentence tokenization utility Splits text into sentences using configurable patterns and rules

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.Split(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Split text into sentences using regex pattern
member.param: Regex pattern for splitting (default: split on .!? followed by whitespace)

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.PostProcess(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Post-process sentences to handle abbreviations and merge short sentences

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.EndsWithAbbreviation(System.String)
member.summary: Check if sentence ends with known abbreviation

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.MergeShortSentences(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Merge sentences shorter than minimum length with adjacent sentences

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.EnforceMaxLength(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Enforce maximum sentence length by splitting long sentences

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.SplitLongSentence(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Split a long sentence at natural boundaries

member.name: M:Hazina.AI.RAG.Utilities.SentenceSplitter.SplitDefault(System.String)
member.summary: Split text into sentences with default settings
